mapper.sql: id, plan_no, associate_no, associate_no_item, associate_no_splitNo, init_inv_type_code, init_customer_no, init_inv_type_value, goal_inv_type_code, goal_customer_no, goal_inv_type_value, modelno, plan_qty, finish_qty, status, delflag, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, doId
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.stock_transfer_plan
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.stock_transfer_plan (id, plan_no, associate_no, associate_no_item, associate_no_splitNo, init_inv_type_code, init_customer_no, init_inv_type_value, goal_inv_type_code, goal_customer_no, goal_inv_type_value, modelno, plan_qty, finish_qty, status, delflag, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, doId ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{initInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{initCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{initInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goalInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goalCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goalInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{finishQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{doid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

insert into dbo.stock_transfer_plan
id,
plan_no,
associate_no,
associate_no_item,
associate_no_splitNo,
init_inv_type_code,
init_customer_no,
init_inv_type_value,
goal_inv_type_code,
goal_customer_no,
goal_inv_type_value,
modelno,
plan_qty,
finish_qty,
status,
delflag,
create_time,
creator,
update_time,
updator,
doId,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{initInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{initCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{initInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goalInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goalCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goalInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{planQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{finishQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{doid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.stock_transfer_plan
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
plan_no = #{record.planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no = #{record.associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
associate_no_item = #{record.associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
associate_no_splitNo = #{record.associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER},
init_inv_type_code = #{record.initInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
init_customer_no = #{record.initCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
init_inv_type_value = #{record.initInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goal_inv_type_code = #{record.goalInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goal_customer_no = #{record.goalCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goal_inv_type_value = #{record.goalInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_qty = #{record.planQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
finish_qty = #{record.finishQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
doId = #{record.doid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.stock_transfer_plan set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_no = #{record.planNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, associate_no = #{record.associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, associate_no_item = #{record.associateNoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, associate_no_splitNo = #{record.associateNoSplitno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, init_inv_type_code = #{record.initInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, init_customer_no = #{record.initCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, init_inv_type_value = #{record.initInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goal_inv_type_code = #{record.goalInvTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goal_customer_no = #{record.goalCustomerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goal_inv_type_value = #{record.goalInvTypeValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_qty = #{record.planQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, finish_qty = #{record.finishQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, doId = #{record.doid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
